verse.name: V1
verse.lines: God picked up a sparrow That can no longer fly. He brushed off its wounds And then watched it soar Into the sky If He's mindful of creation On this I can depend I am His child And I can place all my trust in Him

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I can trust Jesus, I can trust Jesus, He never once Has failed to meet my needs, He is my strong tower The strength in my weakest hour I can trust Jesus He takes care of me.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I have prayed some prayers And felt they never were heard But I held to God's hand And kept right on trusting in His word. My wants and God's desires Don't always agree, But I lean on His will For He always knows What's best for me.
